---
title: "Data Packages"
toc: true
---

### RandomData

For my POL 051 discussion sections I developed a data package called **RandomData**. It includes curated datasets to help students grasp the basics of R and concepts around analyzing and visualizing data.

Included datasets:

- F1 Race, Driver & Constructor Statistics
- ANES 2008 Time Series Data
- ACLED Conflict Data from Mexico and Colombia
- *Upcoming: 2025–2026 NHL and PWHL Statistics*

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/hbdaarstad/RandomData.git)

To install in R:

```r
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("hbdaarstad/RandomData")
```

---

### Upcoming: Mexico Municipality Presidential Election Data

I am currently constructing a dataset of municipality-level presidential elections in Mexico from 2000 to 2025, including candidate gender, party identification, and vote totals.
